yafs.topology¶

class yafs.topology.Topology(logger=None)[source]¶

Wrapper around a NetworkX graph used as the simulation topology.

This class unifies the functions to deal with Complex Networks as a network topology within the simulator. In addition, it facilitates creation and assignment of attributes.

LINK_BW = 'BW'¶

Link feature: Bandwidth

LINK_PR = 'PR'¶

Link feature: Propagation delay

NODE_IPT = 'IPT'¶

Node feature: IPT. Instructions per simulation time unit.

add_node(nodes, edges=None)[source]¶

Add a new node connected to the given list of nodes.

Parameters¶

nodeslist

List of existing node identifiers to which the new node will be connected.

edgeslist, optional

Unused parameter kept for backwards compatibility.

static canonical_edge(key)[source]¶

Normalize an edge identifier for undirected topologies.

create_random_topology(nxGraphGenerator, params)[source]¶

Generate the topology from a NetworkX graph generator.

Parameters¶

nxGraphGeneratorcallable

Graph generator function (e.g. from networkx.generators).

paramslist

Positional parameters to pass to nxGraphGenerator.

create_topology_from_graph(G)[source]¶

Generate the topology from an existing NetworkX graph.

Parameters¶

Gnetworkx.Graph

Graph instance to use as the topology.

find_IDs(value)[source]¶

Search for nodes with matching attributes.

Parameters¶

valuedict

Example: {"model": "m-"}. Only one key is admitted.

Returns¶

list

Node IDs with the same attribute value.

get_edge(key)[source]¶

Return the attributes of a given edge.

Parameters¶

keytuple

Edge identifier, e.g. (1, 9).

get_edge_distance(key)[source]¶

Return the distance in kilometres for an edge.

Intra-cluster links normally omit distanceKm and are treated as negligible-distance links.

get_edges()[source]¶

Return a view of the graph edges, e.g. ((1, 0), (0, 2), ...).

get_info()[source]¶
get_node(key)[source]¶

Return the attributes of a given node.

Parameters¶

keyhashable

Node identifier.

get_nodes()[source]¶

Return a view of all nodes in the graph.

get_nodes_att()[source]¶

Return a dictionary with the features of all nodes.

load(data)[source]¶
load_all_node_attr(data)[source]¶
load_graphml(filename)[source]¶
path_distance(path)[source]¶

Return the total distance in kilometres for a topology path.

remove_node(id_node)[source]¶

Remove a node from the topology.

Parameters¶

id_nodeint

Node identifier.

shortest_path_distance(source, target)[source]¶

Return the shortest path distance in kilometres between two nodes.

size()[source]¶

Return the number of nodes in the topology.

total_bandwidth()[source]¶

Return the sum of the bandwidth of all physical links.

total_links()[source]¶

Return the number of physical links in the topology.
